title: Senior Software Engineer - KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Vijayawada office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies:
KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies!
